name: dinosaurs
stylePhrase: playful natural-history museum-diorama 3D game asset render, high detail, dramatic rim lighting, consistent top-left lighting, ornate intricate surface detail, richly decorated, unmistakable dinosaur motifs and textures covering the entire body of the piece, not just the color palette

w.label: fossil-bone dinosaur
w.palette: sandy tan and cream fossil-bone texture, warm amber highlights, desert palette

b.label: jungle dinosaur
b.palette: deep jungle green scaled hide, dark emerald and moss tones

pieces.k: a {SIDE}, the small cross finial at the very top is sculpted as a miniature tyrannosaurus rex skull with visible jagged teeth, the body below covered in bumpy reptilian dinosaur-hide texture with raised osteoderm scutes
pieces.q: a {SIDE}, the piece's neck curves upward in a long graceful sway like a brachiosaurus's neck before reaching the tiara, the body textured with smooth sauropod hide and small bony back plates
pieces.r: a {SIDE} tower built from rough volcanic mesa rock, studded with small fossilized dinosaur bones and claws embedded in the stone, glowing reptile eyes in the shadows of the crenellations
pieces.b: a {SIDE}, the smooth mitre head is shaped and textured like a curved raptor claw with a sharp ridged edge, the body wrapped in overlapping reptilian scales
pieces.n: a {SIDE} triceratops head profile with a brow horn, frilled neck bone plate, and rough scaled hide texture
pieces.p: a small {SIDE} dinosaur egg dome, the shell beautifully textured with a mottled speckled fossil pattern, resting on an ornate woven twig-and-fern nest base
